goal: Understand how gift cards work with promos.
success_criteria: Agent explains: gift card is a payment method entered at checkout, CAN be used alongside one promo code (gift cards pay, promos discount), balance in Account > Gift Cards, no expiry, not redeemable for cash.

customer_msg: I got a Loomora gift card for my birthday. How do I use it, and can I stack it with SUMMER20?
agent_msg: Welcome to Loomora! You can use your gift card at checkout by entering the card number and PIN. Unfortunately, you can't stack it with the SUMMER20 promo code. Gift cards are a payment method, while promo codes are discounts, and only one promo code can be applied per order. However, you can use your gift card on a discounted cart. If you have any other questions, feel free to ask!

customer_msg: Oh, I see. So I can't use both at the same time, but I can use the gift card on items that are already discounted with SUMMER20?
agent_msg: That's correct! You can use your gift card on items that are already discounted with the SUMMER20 promo code. Just apply the promo code first to get the discount, then use your gift card as the payment method. If you have any other questions, feel free to ask!
